strengths: Exceeds 15-year minimum with 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure domains
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, positioning at edge of agentic AI development
Consistent emphasis on engineering excellence, testable code, and knowledge sharing through workshops, open-source projects, and mentoring
concerns: AI/ML expertise is recent (2025-present) and infrastructure-focused; lacks deep AI domain knowledge, recognized AI products, or strategic platform experience
No evidence of director-level leadership scope—resume shows Staff-level individual contributor titles with no clear team leadership or strategic decision-making authority
Missing preferred Master's or PhD in AI; limited formal AI education and no demonstrated expertise in cloud or AI platform strategy

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and strategic platform experience
Baseline technical breadth and experience duration

response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the minimum 15-year engineering requirement and currently works on AI infrastructure at re:cinq, suggesting growth potential in the AI domain. However, the role explicitly seeks director-level expertise in AI strategy with recognized products or platforms built with AI—his AI experience is recent (since 2025) and infrastructure-focused rather than strategic. The resume also lacks evidence of director-level leadership scope; positions are senior individual contributor roles without clear team leadership, decision-making authority, or product/platform strategy ownership expected for this director-level role. While recent AI exposure is promising, deeper domain expertise and demonstrated leadership at the required seniority level would be necessary.
